name: jotoba-anki
title: Jotoba + Anki
description: Japanese dictionary with Anki integration — search Jotoba, add cards to Anki
author: kuro

commands.name: jotoba
commands.title: Jotoba + Anki
commands.subtitle: Japanese Dictionary
commands.description: Search Jotoba for words and kanji, add to Anki

preferences.name: ankiDeck
preferences.title: Anki Deck Name
preferences.description: The name of your Anki deck for Japanese vocabulary

preferences.name: ankiModel
preferences.title: Anki Note Type/Model
preferences.description: The note type to use (e.g., Basic-d5482, MIA Japanese)

preferences.name: voicevoxSpeaker
preferences.title: VoiceVox Speaker ID
preferences.description: Speaker ID to use for Japanese audio (1-50+)

preferences.name: userLanguage
preferences.title: Definition Language
preferences.description: Language for word definitions (English, Spanish, German, etc.)

preferences.name: autoLoadText
preferences.title: Auto-load selected text
preferences.description: Automatically load selected text from clipboard
